name: Snickers Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake according to package directions.
2. Pour half of the batter into a greased/floured 9x3 inch pan and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, melt the caramels, butter, and milk together. Chop some nuts.
4. Once the cake is done baking, remove it from the oven. Pour the caramel mixture over the top of the cake.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips, peanuts, and the remaining batter evenly over the top.
6. Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 20-30 minutes at 350°F.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely for about 2 hours before cutting into squares.
8. Serve and enjoy!
